reviews.review_title: I love this game so much
reviews.review_description: This game needs a comeback everyone is going to love it again!!!!!!!

Don’t get me wrong I love this game but trust me you should NOT get it. The admins and mods on this game SUCK. I literally just got banned for no reason. Hey Bruh, if you’re reading this WHY DID YOU BAN ME!? Besides the moderation on this game it’s pretty good and I love how I get a free mod menu.

I really love this game. The owner is nice. The moderator is nice but I’ve accidentally got banned. It wasn’t my fault but it was one of the moderators he did on accident though still really fun game. It’s a good new update that they made. I’m trying to get mod. I’m trusted in the discord, but I’ve tried really hard to get trial mod and work my way up. I’ve helped the community a lot, but I still haven’t gotten trial one. I hope I get mod or a trial mod soon ￼

Was told to change my name because it's bannable and I did. After that I was greeted by a moderator named Kenny. He told me all the mods that are bannable and told me that I could use all my mods in a private lobby if I want. This game is genuinely fun and I think you should get it!
